item.title: Memes I stole in 2023
item.description:
I do not endorse this. Newborn stage sucks so bad that even though I loved having a toddler and now school age kid more than anything I’ve ever done, we’re never having another. Can’t do newborn stage ever ever again. Toddlers are savages though lol
Calm down, Chris I think I’m realizing I saved a few of these memes to roast them in private.
Calm down, Dominos
STAHP
item.dc:creator: needlestosay

item.title: Simone Segouin, What a fucking legend!! Sharing in case I'm not the only one who hadn't heard of her before!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: The thought is nice, but...
item.description: Every object I'm given is future work for me. Storing, dusting, moving, maintenance, whatever. If I'm not going to use it or I don't particularly love it... It's going away ASAP. The most frustrating is when I'm given a shirt that I *would* have liked... If they'd actually bought it in my size and in a unisex style. This, despite me telling them my actual size and them knowing I don't wear women's shirts. The shirts go to a donation bin, brand new. Everything else, I'll return and buy something like laundry detergent sheets. I don't know what else to do. I can only politely tell people so many times.
item.dc:creator: KibbIeWhale

item.title: A Bullet Shot In The Air Struck My Uber Driver’s Car. Full article(2013)below about this child being hit below.
item.description: I post this every time I hear about a bullet coming down. I was about 60 or 70 feet away from this boy when he was struck. DO NOT SHOOT YOUR GOD DAMN GUNS IN THE AIR! https://www.12onyourside.com/story/22790363/chesterfield-police-identify-type-of-bullet-that-killed-7-year-old/?outputType=amp
item.dc:creator: YouThinkImEspeciallyNotAGenius
